title: Implement Azure Functions
summary: Learn how to create and deploy Azure Functions. Explore hosting options, bindings, and triggers.

sections.title: Implement Azure Functions
sections.summary: Learn how to create and deploy Azure Functions. Explore hosting options, bindings, and triggers.

lessons.title: Explore Azure Functions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Azure Functions can be a great solution for data processing, systems integration, and building simple APIs and microservices.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-azure-functions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Develop Azure Functions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and deploy Azure Functions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-azure-functions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement Azure Functions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement Azure Functions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
